REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JOAN MEEHAN'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND TO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING WHEN THE ALLEGED BREACHES OCCURRED, AND TO ATTACH OR INCORPORATE BY REFERENCE A COPY OF THE WRITTEN CONTRACT PLAINTIFF ASSERTS HER CLAIM UNDER. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B). JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT JOAN MEEHAN'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF COMPLAINT IS MOOT BASED ON THE COURT'S DECISION TO SUSTAIN THE DEMURRER WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT MAY BRING ANOTHER MOTION TO STRIKE IF AFTER AMENDMENT DEFENDANT STILL BELIEVES THE RELEVANT PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT SHOULD BE STRICKEN FOR LACK OF FACTUAL AND/OR LEGAL SUPPORT. JUDGE RONALD E. QUIDACHAY, CLERK: M. OLOPERNES, NOT REPORTED

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-28-2016 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-07-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-25-16 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-22-2015 Continued To Dec-23-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michaeal Bracamontes, Esq., (415)835-6777 of Bracamontes & Vlasak for Plaintiff/Opposing party Stephanie Bridwell.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard no oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JOAN MEEHAN DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges each cause of action to put Defendant on notice of their claims. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Nov-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Michaeal Bracamontes, Esq., (415)835-6777 of Bracamontes & Vlasak for Plaintiff/Opposing party Stephanie Bridwell.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard no oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT JOAN MEEHAN Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint is DENIED. Order is signed in open Court. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-14-2015 Set For Order To Show Cause On Nov-10-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Continued To Sep-30-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-19-2015 Continued To Aug-05-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Continued To Jun-03-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JOAN MEEHAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED with leave to amend to plead facts showing when the alleged breaches occurred, and to attach or incorporate by reference a copy of the written contract Plaintiff asserts her claim under. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.

Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows: DEFENDANT JOAN MEEHAN's Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint is MOOT based on the Court's decision to sustain the demurrer with leave to amend. Defendant may bring another motion to strike if after amendment Defendant still believes the relevant portions of the complaint should be stricken for lack of factual and/or legal support. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not Reported, D501.
